player.webAudioUnsupported:
Pasensya
Ang browser mo ay hindi suportado ang WebAudio.
Ang mga suportadong browser ay Chrome, Firefox, Safari, at Edge

engines.bassoonDesc: Suportado lamang .xm / .mod. Mag-fallback sa Chiptune3 tapos FFmpeg para sa ibang mga format.
engines.chiptune3Desc: Suporta 20+ formatong tracker (.xm/.mod/.it/.s3m/.mptm/.umx …). Mánabalik ed FFmpeg para ed arum nin format.
engines.ffmpegDesc: Gagawin ya amin ya audio format ya magmula ed MP3. Sankamayaman ya suporta, mas mabagal ya panag-umpisa.

settings.title: Settings
settings.engineDesc: Pumili kung aling audio engine ang gagamitin. Inirerekomenda ang Chiptune3 para sa pinakamahusay na suporta sa tracker format.

comments.title: Mga Komento
comments.disabled: Say-say e daiset ed say build ya.

intro.title: Gabay

tutorialMock.labelTrackMode: Numero ti track + kasalukuyang mode ti playback
tutorialMock.labelActions: I-save ya file · Pinagmulan na ModArchive · Metadatos na track
tutorialMock.labelFilter: Dropdown na pinagmulan: Lahat / Mga Paborito / Kasaysayan  |  Kahon ng paghahanap: maghanap ayon sa pangalan ng file o pamagat
tutorialMock.legendNote: C-4 = Nota (C mayor · ika-4 na oktaba)
tutorialMock.legendEmpty: --- / 00 / … = Walang laman (walang nota / walang instrumento / walang epekto)
tutorialMock.annotModeSwitch: Say mode button normal etan mangapakita lamang na icon — so klik mang-cycle ed apatiran playback modes
tutorialMock.labelFormatFilter: I-click so "Format" para mabuksan so multi-select panel · Channel/Size dropdown filters · Multi-field sort
tutorialMock.annotScopes: Mga waveform kada channel — kada row etan so real-time waveform na sakey ya audio channel
tutorialMock.annotPlaylist: I-click so alinman ya row para manumpa playback · Balang row et mangipapakit: number · title · format · channels · size · filename
tutorialMock.annotAccount: Libre ya rehistro · Say rumansin ya saray paborito tan kasaysayan · Andiay sumusubaybay, andiay anunsyo

intro.tutorialStep3Title: 3. Live Visualization — Panonon na Pattern & Oscilloscope
intro.introWelcome: Sayun mo a makapanood na tracker music ed 68+ format — manlapud ed sikat ya MOD tan XM anggad modernon MPTM tan UMX — nanlapud ed dakel ya koleksyon ed
intro.tutorialClosing: Masantos a pamamati — at maglubay ka sa musika!
intro.tutorialStep3Body: Tracker Player ay nagbibigay-buhay sa musika gamit ang dalawang komplementaryong real-time na visualisasyon:
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Ang playlist iyong puso ng Tracker Player. Gamitin ang search bar sa itaas para makahanap ng mga track ayon sa filename o titulo. Sa ilalim ng search bar, makikita mo ang isang makapangyarihang set ng mga filter:
intro.tutorialStep5Body: Magmukna na libre ya account para ma-unlock so karagdagang feature:
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Matalunggaring tip: Sa mobile, idagdag ang Tracker Player sa iyong home screen para sa isang karanasang katulad ng native app. Mahusay itong gumagana bilang Progressive Web App na may offline caching.
intro.introWelcomeNote: Tracker Player ay mas marami pa sa isang player — ito ay isang buong-kayang tracker music platform na may maganda at responsive na interface, real-time pattern visualization, per-channel oscilloscopes, at isang hanay ng mga tool na dinisenyo para gawing madali ang pagdiskubre at pag-enjoy ng tracked music sa anumang device.
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Say Player ya Tracker so masasakbayan na talaga. Puntan moy settings diad gear icon (top bar) odino Settings ear (left sidebar):
intro.tutorialLead: Giyá na magiya ka ed amin ya feature na Tracker Player, manlapud panaap mo na unoran track mo anggad pankustomisa na player para ed workflow mo.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Ang balang track sa Tracker Player ay may permanenteng at pwedeng ibahaging URL. Kopyahin ang link mula sa address bar ng iyong browser habang tumutugtog ang isang track — magmumukha itong /song/123456/filename.mod. Ipadala ito sa mga kaibigan, i-post sa social media, o i-bookmark para sa susunod. Ang link ay palaging magbubukas ng parehong track.
intro.tutorialStep2Body: I-click so track ed playlist para simula so playback. Load ya kaagad so player — keri ya mag-play so karamihan na file ed tape na isa segundo. Legan ya man-play so track, nanengneng mo:
intro.introWhatBody1: Tracker Player sakey ya open-source personal project ya dedikaan ya mangiyakar na charm na tracker music ed modern browser. Agawa balon audio engine, noagta sakey ya malalim ya integrasyon tan secondary development ya nibangon ed saray umiiral ya magagandang open-source projects, ya manggawa na kompleton user experience system.
intro.changelogIntro: Ang Tracker Player ay nagbago nang malaki mula sa pinagmulan nito bilang isang simpleng MOD/XM player. Narito ang timeline ng mga pangunahing milestone:
intro.introTrackerBody3: Anggad sayan, ing tracker music makatuloy ya mabilay king global demoscene community at kareng retro computing enthusiasts. Ing Tracker Player maglalang yang mangaragul a tau king metung a kakaibang art form a magdala king kasalesayan ning computer music, kapamilatan ning modern interface at convenient interaction.
intro.introWhatBody3: Manenap na pag-anap ed playlist tan pagsasala, audio visualization, sistema na user account ya anggad suporta na internationalization, say Tracker Player et angibangon so kompleton ekosistema na peripheral features ed paligid na player core, a mangipapasen ya mangituloy ed saray user na man-enjoy ed kakaibang charm na tracker music ya anggapoy technical background.
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , sakey ya browser-based Amiga MOD/XM tracker ya sinulat ed pure JavaScript nen Steffest, ya matalek ya manggagawad classic tracker playback experience. Diad pundasyon na saya, say proyekto et insan-sansan ya in-integral so Chiptune3 (sakey ya custom WebAssembly engine a based ed libopenmpt) tan FFmpeg server-side transcoding, ya pinalawak so suporta na format manlapud orihinal ya MOD/XM ya nagawad 68 a format.
intro.creditsIntro: Ang Tracker Player ay itinayo sa mga balikat ng isang kahanga-hangang open-source ecosystem. Ang aming buong 135,400+ track library ay nagmula sa The Mod Archive — ang tiyak na repositoryo ng internet para sa tracker music. Lubos kaming nagpapasalamat sa bawat kontribyutor na ang gawa ay nagpaging posible sa proyektong ito.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Say Vue.js meta-framework ya man-gagana ed amin ya frontend tan backend mi. Say Nuxt et mangiter na server-side rendering para ed mabilis ya page loads tan SEO, Nitro server para ed API routes, SQLite database integration, tan automatic code-splitting para ed optimal performance.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Say tracker music (ya kilala bilang module music o MOD music) et sakey a kakaibang klase na digital music ya nagmula ed bandang late 1980s ed Commodore Amiga. Ag-aro ed MP3 odino streaming audio, say tracker files et walad sikara so musical score (notes, patterns, effects) tan say instrument samples — singa sakey a self-contained music project file. Onsabi ed saya et nagagawa ya tracker files ya makapakurang na space, balet et makapangiter na makapakelaw a musical complexity.
intro.creditsVueDesc: Say progresibon ya JavaScript framework ya gawen para ed component-based UI mi. Say Composition API na Vue, reactivity system, tan single-file components et ginawa ya posible so mangibuild tan mangmaintain na komplikadon player interface ya malinis tan modular ya code.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: Say graphics API na browser ya mang-render ed real-time tracker pattern view. Say pattern note data et na-stream ed WebGL canvas ed 60 fps, ya matapat ya manggagawad scrolling-note look na classic tracker editors a singa ProTracker tan FastTracker II.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: Say LLVM-based compiler toolchain ya mangocompile na C/C++ code to WebAssembly. Gamit mi so Emscripten para compileen so patched libopenmpt — including so custom waveform_processor — loob na single-file WASM module ya maeexecute ed near-native speed loob na AudioWorklet na browser.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: Ginawa na mga kontribyutor ng OpenMPT. Ang tiyak na open-source tracker playback library, na sumusuporta sa 68+ module format na may walang kapantay na katumpakan. Binago namin ang C source code ng libopenmpt — nagdagdag ng custom waveform_processor na kumukuha ng per-channel PCM data sa loob ng mixer bago ang huling output — at pinagsama-sama ito sa WebAssembly sa pamamagitan ng Emscripten. Ang aming patched WASM build ay pumapalit sa upstream pre-compiled binary na kasama ng Chiptune3, na nagbibigay-daan sa per-channel oscilloscopes at bumubuo ng decoding backbone para sa lahat ng 68+ format.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: Ginawa ni DrSnuggles — isang open-source na JavaScript library na bumabalot sa libopenmpt sa isang AudioWorklet para sa pag-playback sa browser ng 68+ tracker format. Para sa proyektong ito, inayos namin ang AudioWorklet processor upang kunin ang per-channel waveform data (nagpapagana sa multi-channel oscilloscopes), nagdagdag ng automatic gain control, at pinalakas ang paghawak ng race-condition para sa mabilis na paglipat ng track. Ang Chiptune3 ay nagsisilbing tulay sa pagitan ng Web Audio API ng browser at ng decoding power ng aming na-patch na libopenmpt build, at ito ang aming inirerekomendang default engine.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: Ing W3C Web Audio API a detalye na magpapagana na low-latency, walang-glitch na audio processing ed dedicated real-time thread. Say AudioWorklet et diad lapag ya andiay Chiptune3 engine ya mamapaandar ed compiled libopenmpt WASM, independent ed main UI thread, a mangipapaseguro na smooth playback anggano antokaman so interface activity.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: Ginawa nen Steffest. Metung a matapat a browser-based reimplementation da reng classic Amiga MOD at XM trackers — ProTracker at FastTracker II — a sinulat a mabilug king JavaScript. Ing BassoonTracker magbigay yang authentic, mainit a playback a migumpisa king proyektong iti, a mayayag a suporta para kareng classic 4-channel MOD at multi-channel XM a kayabe la reng envelopes, filters, at effects.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Sayt ya principal ya repository para ed tracked music, ya mangitatalaga na masulok 150,000 a module manlapud libon-libo ya artista ed apat a dekada. Say Mod Archive so bugtuan a pinagkuanan na musika ed librarya mi tan say ag-naliliwan ya institusyon para ed tracking community.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Say format et ya impormal ya ginmapad ya Karsten Obarski's Ultimate Soundtracker ed 1987, tan mabilis ya binmalo diad demoscene — say makulay ya subculture ya saray programmer, musikero, tan artista so mangaalagey ya manggawa na makapagagang audiovisual ya obra. Diad saray dekada, dakel ya tracker format so linma, balang sakey et mangitultulod ed saray hangganan na posible: mas dakel ya channel, mas maabig ya epekto, synthesize ya instrumento, suporta na VST plugin, tan pati kompleto ya mixing ya kakayarian. Natan, say tracker scene et mananatili ya aktibo ed interon mundo, ya wala ray balon musika ya lalapag araw-araw ed saray site a singa The Mod Archive.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Say framework CSS ya unauna ya magamit para ed estilo. Say sistema na design token na Tailwind so mangipapagana ed 16-theme architecture mi — amin a kolor, anino, tan hangganan so mang-aadaptar ed aktibo a tema diad saray CSS custom properties ya ginawa manlapud configuration na Tailwind mi.
tutorialStep1Filters: Format Filter — Pindot para buksan ang multi-select grid na naglalaman ng lahat ng available na format. Gamitin ang preset buttons para mabilis na pumili ng grupo: Bassoon (MOD/XM), Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), Chiptune3 All (56 na format), o All Supported.
Filter ng Channel — Palawigin sa bilang ng channel: 4 na channel (klasikong MOD era), 8 na channel, o 8+ na channel (modernong multitrack).
Size Filter — I-filter ayon sa sukat ng file: maliit (<100KB), katamtaman, o malaki (>1MB).
Pangalan ng Filter ng Tracker — Mag-type ng pangalan ng tracker (hal., "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") para makahanap ng musikang ginawa gamit ang partikular na software.
Mga Pagpipilian sa Pag-ayos — Ayusin ang playlist ayon sa ID, pamagat, pangalan ng file, laki, o petsa ng pagbabago, sa pataas o pababang pagkakasunod-sunod.
Pamili ya Pinagkuan — Lumipat ed Amin ya Track, saray Paborito mo, tan saray Historya na Panag-ayam.
tutorialStep2Details: Impormasyon na Track — Titulo, artista, format, bilang na channel, at numero na track ya ipapakitad ed tapew na saray kontrol na player.

Play/Pause & Navigation — Dakel a play/pause ya balor na play/pause button ya walay playback mode selector: Shuffle (random), In Order (sunod-sunod), Loop One (ulitin iya), o Stop After Current (para pagkatapos na kasalukuyan).
Sunod nga Track — Laktawan papunta sa sunod na track nang manu-mano, o hayaan ang napili mong playback mode na gawin ito.
Volume & Progress — I-ayos so volume diad slider, man-advance ed track, tan nengnengen so oras ya anlapu tan so tagey.
Like Button — I-click so puso para idagdag so track ed sarili mon paborito (mangailangan na account).
I-download — I-save ya orihinal ya tracker file ed device mo.
Link na ModArchive — Buksan so pahina na track ed The Mod Archive para na mas dakel ya konteksto tan komento na komunidad.

Impormasyon na Modal na Track — Tánawin metádata a detalyado: ngaran tracker, petsa, lawig, klase container, subsongs, bilang channel, instrumento, samples, orders, patterns, at anumang naka-embed na mensahe manlapud kompositor.
tutorialStep3Details: Panoramang Pattern — Nanengneng so aktuwal ya data na tracker pattern ya mag-scroll ed real time, na-render ed WebGL para ed makinis ya performance. Balang kolum so mangirepresenta na sakey a channel, balang row so sakey a note event. Amin ya nota, instrumento, volume, tan effect command et naipapakita — singa ed classic tracker editor. I-click so pattern toggle pian man-iba ed pagitan na vertical (tradisyonal) tan horizontal (malapad a screen) ya layout.

Per-Channel Oscilloscopes — Sa lalam ning player, makakita ka na metung a grid da reng waveform displays — metung para king balang audio channel king track. Deng reti pinapagana ning sarili ming custom C-level waveform processor a makabukud king libopenmpt, a mang-extract kareng indibidwal a channel audio bayu ing final mixing. Panooran mo ing waveform ning balang channel a mag-scroll king real time, a magbibie karing visual fingerprint nung makanungu ing musika a ginawa — kick drum king channel 1, bass king channel 2, lead king channel 3, at aliwa pa.
Duwari ya visualizations ay mapapag-on/off ed Settings para ed performance o preference.
tutorialStep4Settings: Playback Engine — Piliin so Paganap a Engine — Mamili ed BassoonTracker (classic MOD/XM), Chiptune3 (recommended, 20+ formats), odino FFmpeg (sankamaylaw a suporta na format diad panamegley na server-side conversion).

Tema — Pumili mula sa 16 na tema ng kulay. Kasama sa maliwanag na tema ang Maliwanag, Retro (Solarized), Karagatan (Teal), Kagubatan (Berde), Strawberry (Rosas), Asul, Rosas, Cyan, Kahel, at Gray. Kasama sa madilim na tema ang Madilim, Hatinggabi (Malalim na Lila), Ginto (Itim at Ginto), Lila, Pula, at Berde.
Language — 52 a lenguahe na interface. Say preferencia mo et nisave ed lokal.
Volume — Itakda so default a volume level tan opsyonal a piliten ed kada track.
Panormalisasyon na Makarinig — Awtomatikong i-adjust so playback volume para sa consistent a pakikinig (naka-on bilang default).
Kadua ya Loop Count — Saray kanta na Tracker et mabetbet ya mag-loop ya anggad anggapo. Mangiset na maksimum ya loop count pian ag-iter na walay panaon (default: 1).
Mga Toggle sa Display — Ipakita o itago ang visualization ng scope, pattern view, at introduction section.
tutorialStep5Details: Favorites — I-heart so track para i-save ed listaan mo na favorites, a na-access ed playlist source selector.
Kasaysayan na Panag-ayam — Amin a track ya na-play mo et awtomatikong na-record. I-browse so kasaysayan mo pian na-re discover so saray track.
Cross-Device Sync — A sarili mong paborito at history ay sumusunod sa iyo sa iba't ibang device kapag nag-log in ka.
Pribasidad — Sayant la nen i-account ya so saray paborito tan kasaysayan. Ag-aanap o naibabahagi so personal a datos.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: Sayantun aklatan na 135,400+ tracker music files ya sumasaklaw ed 68+ format, manlapud 4-channel MODs anggad 256-channel epics.
Triple-engine architecture: BassoonTracker (classic JS), Chiptune3 (AudioWorklet + libopenmpt WASM), tan FFmpeg (server-side transcoding) — awtomatikung napili para ed balang file.
View ya pattern tracker real-time na na-render sa WebGL — panoorin ang mga nota na nag-s-scroll na parang sa classic tracker editor.
Saray waveform oscilloscope kada channel — nanengneng so audio output na kada channel bilang live a scrolling waveform, ya pinapagana na custom C-level waveform extraction.
Diseño responsive que se adapta perfectamente a cualquier pantalla: desktop, tablet o teléfono — incluyendo el modo de patrón horizontal para pantalla ancha.
16 a maingat a ginawang kulay tema — manlapud ed malinaw a liwanag anggad masulok a kagabi, solarized retro, mainit a balitok, tan amin a bagay ed pagbaetan.
52 a lengguahe di interface — para maging accessible so tracker music ed saray taga-ibang bansa.
Mekusad ya panag-anap, multi-pili format filter kaiba na saray preset a butones (Bassoon, Major Tracker, Chiptune3, Amin a Suportado), filter na bilang na channel, tan multi-field a panag-urnos.
Sistema ti account nga addaan iti paborito ken pakasaritaan ti panagay-ayam — i-sync ti librariom iti amin a al-aladmo.
Permanenteng magagamit na mga link ng kanta — bawat track ay may kanya-kanyang URL tulad ng /song/123456/filename.mod.
I-download so original tracker files o i-convert sa MP3 na may isang click.
Panel na impormasyon na nagpapakita ng metadata: titulo, artista, tracker, format, channels, instruments, samples, orders, patterns, at naka-embed na mensahe.
Ganap na libre, open-source, at pinapatakbo ng komunidad — walang mga ad, walang pagsubaybay, walang bayad.

trackInfo.title: Titulo
trackInfo.noMeta: Awan metadatos ya makukuha para ed sayan track.

cache.cleared: Na-clear na ang naka-cache na playlist!

alerts.favoritesFailed: Sindi ya update irayu ya favorites.
